title: AeraMax® Air Purifier - True HEPA, PlasmaTrue

specs.materials: True HEPA filter (4-stage filtration), activated carbon filter, AeraSafe Antimicrobial Treatment
key_features: True HEPA filter captures 99.97% of particles ≥0.3 microns
Bipolar ionizer ozone output max 4.0 ppb (well below 50 ppb limit)
Captures: pollen, dust, pet dander, smoke, mold, allergens, odors
specs.notes: BBI title doesn't specify a model. AeraMax line spans residential (90, 100, 190, 200, 290, 300, DX55) through commercial (PureView Pro AM 4). Match to specific BBI SKU needed for full specs.
